commit.message:
Continuous benchmarks (#1463)

- Add GitHub Actions workflow to run continuous benchmarks and publish to a tracking website.
- Use `GetDateTime()` to avoid intermediate string allocation.

Consume .NET daily builds

Update to the latest daily build of .NET 9.

Consume .NET daily builds

Update to the latest daily build of .NET 9.
